title: Vanilla Extract
body:
# Vanilla Extract 
Vanilla Extract is a Vanilla+ ish modpack that is made for QCXR/QuestCraft Staff server.

## Modpack features
Best to play together, has many features that add on to the vanilla game instead of replacing entirely, and has high support with other mods.

## Played on QuestCraft
As of Patreon Beta 5, this pack is 100% [Playable](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SFHbwKqesbA&t=32s).
## Made for modded
With OVOP being the backbone of this modpack, you will be able to play on anything, no matter how bad.

### Performnace
Has been tested with 6GB, 4GB of allocation, but should run well if its above 2GB.

*There are many uncredited mods, to check mods use the version of the modpack to check.*
